name: ADR validator confirms the decision outcome with rationale is present per MADR template
command:
mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0001 D1
## Decision outcome
Chose Option A because of the following rationale that explains the choice.
' > docs/adr/0001-d1.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/validate-naming.sh" --adr-dir docs/adr --check outcome 2>out.txt && grep -q 'outcome_present=true' out.txt && grep -q 'rationale_length>=20' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
